title: Engitta Mothathey Lyrics Rajadhi Raja Song Lyrics
stanzas:
Engitta mothaathey
naan raajathi raajanadaa
vambu iukkadhey
naan veeraadhi veeranadaa

ini thappaattam
ennodu aadaadhey
ada appuramaa
kuthu pattu odaadhey

Engitta mothaathey
naan raajathi raajanadaa
vambu iukkadhey
naan veeraadhi veeranadaa

munnaala kola
pinnaala veeran
pennaalathaan naaney
aal aaginen

ellaarkkum veeran
kattaayam undu
enaku adhu konjam
adhigam thambi

thappana velaiku
ennaalum naaney
eppodhum thunaiyaaga 
aanathillae

tharkkaappukkaaga
naan podum sanda
thappaaga oru naalum
ponadhilla

sarakku irundhaa
viththu paaru
saada pechu pesa venaam

ada verappu edhukku
narambu silirkkum
un odambu otchamaga venaam

ye vethu vaettuu
konjam oram kattu
ada taangu takkara
takkara takkara da..

Engitta mothaathey
naan raajathi raajanadaa
vambu iukkadhey
naan veeraadhi veeranadaa

kaththi kaththi sanda
vaai valikka potta
kaththoda pogum
adhu thevayila

katchi katti aadum
aattam ingu venaam
puthi kettum pogaadhey
neeyum veenaa

unnoda vazhka unkayil
irukku 
aduthavan koduththa
adhu nikkaathappaa

ye kasta pattu
ulachi munnera paary
istapattu ellorum
pinnaal varuvaar

padhavi irundhaa
paththu peru
padhavikkaaga nooru peru

kaasukkuthaan
madhippu irukku
manisanukku engu irukku

enaku katchiyum venaam
oru kodiyum venaam

ada taangu takkara
takkara takkara da..

Engitta mothaathey
naan raajathi raajanadaa
vambu iukkadhey
naan veeraadhi veeranadaa

ini thappaattam
ennodu aadaadhey
ada appuramaa
kuthu pattu odaadhey

en maaman kitta
modhaadhey
avan raajadhi raajana
vambukku ilukkaadhey
ivar sooraadhi sooranadaa

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song 'Engitta Mothathey'?

The song conveys a sense of pride and energy, celebrating the spirit of being a hero and enjoying life.

What is the plot context of the movie 'Rajadhi Raja'?

The movie revolves around themes of heroism and valor, with the protagonist showcasing his bravery and charm.

Who are the singers of this song?

The song features the talented voices of K. S. Chithra and Mano.

Who composed the music for 'Engitta Mothathey'?

The music for this energetic track was composed by the renowned Ilaiyaraaja.

When was 'Engitta Mothathey' released?

The song was released on March 4, 1989.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In 'Engitta Mothathey', the protagonist expresses his heroic spirit and zest for life through vibrant lyrics and an upbeat melody. The song serves as a celebration of bravery and joy, perfectly aligning with the themes of the movie Rajadhi Raja. Its energetic beats and catchy tune evoke feelings of excitement and happiness, making it a memorable classic in Tamil cinema. The collaboration of K. S. Chithra and Mano adds a unique charm, ensuring its place in the hearts of fans.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Engitta Mothathey from the Rajadhi Raja movie is a vibrant dance number that showcases the energetic vocals of K. S. Chithra and Mano. The song's lively beats, composed by the legendary Ilaiyaraaja, perfectly capture the spirit of celebration and joy. This classic track is sure to get everyone on their feet, making it a timeless favorite in Tamil cinema.
stanzaMeanings: Where are you, my dear? I am the king of the kingdom, don't joke with me. I am a brave warrior, and now I won't dance to anyone's tune. Just look at my dance, it's a powerful beat. Where are you, my dear? I am the king of the kingdom, don't joke with me. I am a brave warrior, and in the past and future, I have become a hero. Everyone has a hero inside them. I have a little more than that. No matter what, I will always be a support. I will fight for justice. I will never lose. If there is a drink, just look at it. Don't talk nonsense. Why should I be afraid? Don't let your body shake. Don't let your house fall apart. Just keep your head up.
